errors.message: requestWalkInSlotsUsecase should not write to availabilitySlot; walk-in slot suggestion is a read-only recommendation usecase.

trace: Verified ownership: all tables are moduleOwned; excludedEntities correctly lists all MDM ontology entities.
Verified tableKind: both tables are transactional; no metric tables are defined in this index.
Verified necessity: both tables are derived from approved artifacts, ontology, workflows and usecases.

Checked readsByArtifacts/writesByArtifacts: availabilitySlot has reads and writes from multiple artifacts, but requestWalkInSlotsUsecase is a recommendation usecase that only generates suggestions and must not write to the availability slot table.
